text:
Created attachment 171435
games/tome4: 1.4.6 -> 1.4.8

Please update games/tome4 to 1.4.8. These are back-to-back bugfix releases.

Changelog:
https://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2016/06/news/tales-majeyal-147-aka-perception-released
https://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2016/06/news/tales-majeyal-148-aka-redemption-released

Per stage-qa, this also adds a previously-missing libpng dependency.
